revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{for|the talk page banner|Template:GA}} {{High-use|{{GA number}}}} <!--Categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]])-->
== About == This template places a small green circle with a plus sign ([[File:Symbol support vote.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[WP:Good articles|good article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Good article criteria|good article criteria]], successfully passing the [[Wikipedia:Good article nominations|good article nomination process]]. It also categorizes them into [[:Category:Good articles]].
The template links to {{-r|Wikipedia:Good articles*}} as a [[WP:statistical redirect|statistical redirect]].
== Usage == This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a good article fails a [[Wikipedia:Good article reassessment|good article reassessment nomination]], as well as articles that have never passed a good article nomination before. If a good article is subsequently promoted to [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article status]], this template is then replaced by [[Template:Featured article]].
{{Top icon templates}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!--Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata--> [[:en:Category:Top icon content award templates|Category:Top icon content award templates]] }}</includeonly>
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "This template places a small green circle with a plus sign (a so called top icon) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a good article on Wikipedia, i.e. it met the good article criteria and successfully passed the good article nomination process." } </templatedata> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia good articles templates]] [[Category:Title templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Good_article%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Good_article%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{for|the talk page banner|Template:GA}} {{High-use|{{GA number}}}} <!--Categories where indicated at the bottom of this page, please; interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]])-->
== About == This template places a small green circle with a plus sign ([[File:Symbol support vote.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[WP:Good articles|good article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Good article criteria|good article criteria]], successfully passing the [[Wikipedia:Good article nominations|good article nomination process]]. It also categorizes them into [[:Category:Good articles]].
The template links to {{-r|Wikipedia:Good articles*}} as a [[WP:statistical redirect|statistical redirect]].
== Usage == This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a good article fails a [[Wikipedia:Good article reassessment|good article reassessment nomination]], as well as articles that have never passed a good article nomination before. If a good article is subsequently promoted to [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article status]], this template is then replaced by [[Template:Featured article]].
{{Top icon templates}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!--Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata--> [[:en:Category:Top icon content award templates|Category:Top icon content award templates]] }}</includeonly>
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "This template places a small green circle with a plus sign (a so called top icon) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a good article on Wikipedia, i.e. it met the good article criteria and successfully passed the good article nomination process." } </templatedata> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia good articles templates]] [[Category:Title templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Good_article%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} {{for|the talk page banner|Template:GA}} {{High-use|{{GA number}}}}
== About == This template places a small green circle with a plus sign ([[File:Symbol support vote.svg|14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a [[WP:Good articles|good article on Wikipedia]], and that it has met the [[Wikipedia:Good article criteria|good article criteria]], successfully passing the [[Wikipedia:Good article nominations|good article nomination process]]. It also categorizes them into [[:Category:Good articles]].
The template links to {{-r|Wikipedia:Good articles*}} as a [[WP:statistical redirect|statistical redirect]].
== Usage == This template should be placed at the top of the article after hatnotes. It should be removed if a good article fails a [[Wikipedia:Good article reassessment|good article reassessment nomination]], as well as articles that have never passed a good article nomination before. If a good article is subsequently promoted to [[Wikipedia:Featured articles|featured article status]], this template is then replaced by [[Template:Featured article]].
{{Top icon templates}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
[[:en:Category:Top icon content award templates|Category:Top icon content award templates]] }}</includeonly>
== TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "This template places a small green circle with a plus sign (a so called top icon) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that it is a good article on Wikipedia, i.e. it met the good article criteria and successfully passed the good article nomination process." } </templatedata> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia good articles templates]] [[Category:Title templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
